title: helichrysum arboreum
intro: Helichrysum arboreum, also known as the Tree of Life or the Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum arboreum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues, among others. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
